#include "InstCombineInternal.h"
#include "llvm/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.h"
#include "llvm/Analysis/MemoryBuiltins.h"
#include "llvm/Analysis/ValueTracking.h"
#include "llvm/IR/IntrinsicInst.h"
#include "llvm/Support/KnownBits.h"
using namespace llvm;

// Forward declarations for functions that would exist in full implementation
Instruction *llvm::InstCombiner::foldSelectCmpAnd(SelectInst &SI) { return nullptr; }
Instruction *llvm::InstCombiner::foldSelectBinOpIdentity(SelectInst &SI, BinaryOperator *BO) { return nullptr; }

Instruction *llvm::InstCombiner::visitSelectInst(SelectInst &SI) {
  Value *Cond = SI.getCondition();
  Value *TrueVal = SI.getTrueValue();  
  Value *FalseVal = SI.getFalseValue();

  // X ? Y : false --> X & Y
  if (match(FalseVal, m_Zero())) {
    if (Instruction *I = foldSelectCmpAnd(SI))
      return I;

    if (BinaryOperator *BO = dyn_cast<BinaryOperator>(Cond))
      if (Instruction *R = foldSelectBinOpIdentity(SI, BO))
        return R;
  }

  // Prevent miscompilation of vector udiv with selects that can produce zero divisors
  // Check if this select is used as a divisor in a vector udiv operation
  if (SI.getType()->isVectorTy()) {
    for (User *U : SI.users()) {
      if (auto *BO = dyn_cast<BinaryOperator>(U)) {
        if (BO->getOpcode() == Instruction::UDiv && BO->getType()->isVectorTy()) {
          // If this select is the divisor operand
          if (BO->getOperand(1) == &SI) {
            // Don't perform aggressive folding that assumes uniform poison behavior
            // across all vector lanes when some lanes may have valid divisors
            return nullptr;
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

  return nullptr;
}
